title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Vodafone Idea

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Vodafone Idea
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Software Engineer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!
